title: Luffy Stands Up to the Bandits
description: On pages 27–30, this part follows the Romance Dawn flashback and focuses on how Luffy’s pirate dream is formed through Shanks, Higuma, and the straw hat promise.
scene: Luffy’s loyalty to Shanks pushes him into danger as the bandits turn their attention toward him.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: A REAL MAN HAS TO STAND UP FOR HIMSELF, NO MATTER WHAT.

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Is that right? I guess I don't under- stand.

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: That's right. You don't.

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: make way for the terror of the highlands!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WHATA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No Pirates today, eh? Smells better...

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: WE WERE IN THE AREA, SO WE STOPPED BY.

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: WHAT'RE YOU WAITING FOR?

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: WE'RE CUSTOMERS!!

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: Serve us drinks!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: MAYOR! we've got a problem!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: WHAT'S WRONG, MAKINO!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AND THE MOUNTAIN BANDITS!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YOU'VE GOT A STRANGE BODY, BOY.

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: OUR PUNCHES AND KICKS AREN'T HURTING YOU AT ALL.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: HEY! WE GOTTA GO HELP LIFFY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ARE YOU CRAZY? THOSE MOUNTAIN BANDITS WOULD KILL US!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: besides, Luffy's the one that started the fight!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Darn you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: You'd better take it back!!!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: You jerk I

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: THERE SURE ARE SOME WEIRD CREATURES IN THE WORLD...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Eh, rubber boy?

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: OOF!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Darn you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: I'VE DIS- COVERED A NEW LIFE FORM...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: I'll make you so sorry for this!!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: MAYBE I'LL SELL YOU TO A FREAK SHOW...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: I bet they'll pay good money for you.

summary: Luffy Stands Up to the Bandits is the main story beat of this section. The dialogue and reactions show how the chapter’s conflict develops, while the scene keeps the focus on the characters’ choices rather than technical OCR structure.
